content.en:
The five perfect controllers of the Ten Thousand Dragons Hall came to the Yang Yan Forbidden Land, and were shocked when they saw the Lord of the Tyrannosaurus and a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm fighting.

They didn't immediately step forward to help, after all, the identity of any half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm was not ordinary, and when they didn't understand the situation, they naturally didn't dare to make rash moves.

After all, although the strength of the Ten Thousand Dragons Hall is not weak, it is not worth mentioning in the entire Eternal Ruins, and if it offends the top powers, the Ten Thousand Dragons Hall may be destroyed.

However, they still spied into the past time and space, and learned about the time and space situation of the Yang Yan Forbidden Land, and then they knew what happened.

"It turned out to be a polar substance!"

The five perfect controllers were amazed.

Extremely powerful material, what a precious treasure this is, it is basically controlled by those top forces with this kind of resource, and it is not the turn of a force like the Ten Thousand Dragons Hall at all.

However, what made them extremely angry was that the Lord of the Tyrannosaurus was so selfish that he discovered the Extreme Creation Substance, and even did not tell them, but secretly asked his son Wyvern to secretly collect these Extreme Creation Substances, which made a mistake.

If the Lord of the Tyrannosaurus told them the five, the six of them would have no suspicions, and if they directly entered the depths of the Yang Yan Forbidden Land, wouldn't they be able to easily take away these extreme creation substances.

In that case, there would not have been such a thing.

"You five help me!"

The Lord of the Tyrannosaurus hurriedly said.

If it weren't for the fact that his will clone was not here, but in an incomparably distant place, he wouldn't have let Ye Tian's will clone succeed.

Now, he just wanted to snatch the Extreme Creation Material from Ye Tian's body, and if he could kill Ye Tian, then kill him.

Airplanes!!!

The five perfect controllers of the Ten Thousand Dragons Hall surrounded Ye Tian.

One of the Perfect Controllers said, "This friend, as long as you hand over those Extreme Creation Materials, our Ten Thousand Dragons Hall will not embarrass you!"

The five of them Perfect Controllers only wanted to create extreme matter, and they didn't want to offend Ye Tian.

After all, they didn't want to kill Ye Tian.

"What if I don't hand over the pole-making substances? If you dare to let my master be used as cannon fodder, these pole-making materials will be regarded as compensation!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

"Your master?"

The five perfect controllers frowned, not knowing who the master Ye Tian was talking about.

However, at the moment, since Ye Tian was unwilling to hand over the Extreme Creation Substance, they would not let Ye Tian leave.

Just when these five perfect controllers were about to make a move, Ye Tian took out his perfect treasure, the Blood Blade Knife.

With the cultivation of Ye Tianzao's half-step perfect master, it was enough to completely control the low-grade perfect treasure of the Blood Blade Knife.

And among some forces, even the perfect controller does not necessarily have the perfect treasure.

For example, in the Ten Thousand Dragons Palace, there is only one perfect treasure, and it is not an attack-type perfect treasure, but only an auxiliary perfect treasure, so it cannot enhance their strength.

When Ye Tian took out the low-grade Perfect Treasure Blood Blade Blade, he used the Ten Thousand Blades of the Extremely Perfect Control Technique, and with one blow, he broke through the defense of the Lord of the Tyrannosaurus and directly penetrated his body.

Under this blow, the Lord of the Tyrannosaurus was not lightly injured.

"Perfect Treasure!"

The Tyrannosaurus Lord's expression changed.

They didn't expect that Ye Tian actually had a perfect treasure, and it was very suitable for Ye Tian, which was enough to make Ye Tian's strength skyrocket, and they didn't have such a perfect treasure to increase their strength!

"Lord of the Tyrannosaurus, forget it!" said another perfect controller, "We can't kill him, and we can't stop him from leaving!

"At the very least, we have to leave some polar material behind!"

The Lord of the Tyrannosaurus gritted his teeth.

"Hahaha, there seems to be a little bit of polar substance in the depths of the Yang Yan Forbidden Land, I didn't pick it, you can find it yourself!"

Saying that, Ye Tian's copy body and will clone were about to leave.

The Lord of the Tyrannosaurus hesitated, but still didn't chase after him.

The other five Perfect Masters searched for the Golden Flower Creation Substance in the depths of the Forbidden Land, and finally found some, but the number was too small.

Subsequently.

The six perfect controllers of the Ten Thousand Dragons Hall went to inquire about Ye Tian's origin, and Ye Tian's reputation in the Eternal Ruins was not small, so he quickly inquired clearly.

"That guy turned out to be a half-step perfect controller of the Void Tower's Extreme Creation Realm!!"

The Tyrannosaurus Lord's pupils shrank, a little shocked.

That's the Daoless Tower, one of the nine most powerful forces in the Ruins of Eternity, just send a strong person to destroy the Ten Thousand Dragons Palace, and judging from the inquiring situation, not long after Ye Tian joined the Wudao Tower, he was promoted all the way from the Ten Realms level controller to the half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm, and he was a demonic genius that the Wudao Tower valued extremely much.

"Lord of the Tyrannosaurus, the Flying Dragon Controller will die if he dies, anyway, there is more than one of your heirs, it's a big deal to cultivate another one. Moreover, this time you are too greedy, if you tell us, there will be no such thing!"

"Forget it, it's useless to talk more, so as not to affect the relationship between us, in short, there is still some extreme material left this time, everyone will share it!"

"Lord of the Tyrannosaurus, don't think about revenge, Ye Tian, the endless controller of the Wudao Tower, is too demonic, and his future achievements are not comparable to ours, if you really offend him, you are at risk of falling!"

One by one, the perfect controller convinces the lord of the tyrannosaurus.

And the Lord of the Tyrannosaurus nodded slightly: "I know, let's go over this matter, besides, this time I'm greedy, I'm sorry everyone!"

These five perfect controllers didn't blame the Tyrannosaurus Lord much, and their dissatisfaction was certain, but the Tyrannosaurus Lord also suffered a lot of losses, so they couldn't say anything.

Besides, if they really face this situation, maybe they will choose to covet all the extreme substances like the Lord of the Tyrannosaurus.

......

Outside the Pathless Tower.

Ye Tian brought the Ten Elements Ancestor here.

"Master, what are your plans next?" Ye Tian asked as soon as he released the Ten Elements Ancestor from the Void Ball.

The Ten Elements Ancestor sighed and said: "Ye Tian, there is the Ten Thousand Dragons Palace, I definitely can't go back, and I joined the Ten Thousand Dragons Palace, and now I am sure that I will be a traitor if I leave, and the ordinary forces will not want me." "

"That's it, Master, I will arrange you to enter some of the organizational forces under the command of the Wudao Tower, and the treatment will not be worse than that of the Ten Thousand Dragons Palace. Ye Tian said.

"That's for the best!"

The Ten Elements Ancestor said happily.

Subsequently, Ye Tian arranged a half-step perfect controller as a half-step perfect controller of his own Extreme Realm, which was naturally a very simple matter, and no one would say anything.

Soon, the Ten Elements Ancestor was arranged.

Then, Ye Tian returned to the Wudao Tower, took out those pole-making materials, and prepared to use these pole-making materials and some existing resources to impact the second pole-making chain.

Once he breaks the second chain of pole creation, his strength will inevitably become even stronger!
